text.title: Architect PR Review Checklist Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how architect-pr-review-checklist produces a valid report artefact.

example.title: Happy-path application
example.code:
--- artefact_id: architect-pr-review-acme-431 owner: Ruslan Faion <ruslan@faion.net> pr_url: https://github.com/acme/api/pull/431 verdict: block time_spent_minutes: 14 ---
## 1. Contract: ok - Adds GET /api/v1/orders/{id}/events — documented in OpenAPI spec. - Backward compatible.
## 2. Dependency direction: violation - `domain/order.py` imports from `infra/sqlalchemy/session.py` — domain depends on infra. - Required fix: inject session via port; move import to adapter layer.
## 3. Error model: ok
## 4. Observability: ok
## 5. Security: ok
## 6. ADR conformance: violation - Contradicts ADR-014 (no domain → infra import). - Required: revert or write a superseder ADR.
## Verdict block: 2 violations (dep direction + ADR-014). Required fixes < 1h; do NOT escalate.
example.note: Demonstrates the rules from 01-core-rules.xml applied to a concrete input; output validates against the schema in 02-output-contract.xml.
